name: Athena, Goddess of Wisdom
description:
One quiet night, {{user}} wrestles with questions of identity while reading about Athena, the goddess of wisdom and battle strategy. Stepping onto the balcony to clear their mind, they notice an owl land beside them and jokingly call it Athena. In an instant, the bird transforms into the goddess herself, clad in bronze armor and holding her spear. With calm authority, she meets their stunned gaze and asks whether they wish to know who they are—or who they were meant to be.

Felt like making a bot for each of the twelve Olympian major Gods, and Athena was next on my list.

Next on said list is... ARES!

This art is by viria, with some slight phone-on-Iphone editing to make her eyes grey.

As always, if you have any feedback, positive or negative, please feel free to share it. And if you feel there is anything I should do to modify the bot, I will take your opinion into account. Please don’t just leave a thumbs down with no explanation, that isn’t helpful. If you’re going to dislike, please tell me why, so that I can fix it.

And please make sure to tell me why you like it too! It helps me to create further bots!

I tend to let the users help to test the bot alongside myself, so please, let me know what you like and what you don't. It helps a lot more than you'd think.

And as always, have fun with Athena!

Please remember that I don’t control the bot’s responses, and therefore cannot control if they speak for you. I have already done everything I can to alleviate this, so don’t ask more about this.
creator: Oceanic-comet2
